title: Hearti-liciously yours
description: If you wish to bake love and romance into your relationship, this photo cake can be of immense help. The flavourful layers of the cake will surely make your lover or spouse melt for you. And the lovely photo of you both frosted on it will make things between you much sweeter and lovable. You can get the names iced on it as well, along with the photo. <strong> Avoid placing the photo and poster cake in a refrigerator as the chilled droplets can spoil the photo on the top of the cake. </strong>
